item.title: Davidryanspaulding is the peak example of being just grating enough to be a Zionist propagandists and not nearly funny enough to...
item.description:
Davidryanspaulding is the peak example of being just grating enough to be a Zionist propagandists and not nearly funny enough to get paid well for it.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: these two tendencies of course exist within every piece of discourse regarding Israel and can’t be properly understood as just d...
item.description:
these two tendencies of course exist within every piece of discourse regarding Israel and can’t be properly understood as just distinctive people or distinctive parties, l just do so for simplicity here. And I obviously condemn both of these tendencies, but it’s important to understand them so we don’t get lost.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: The racism is not an accident or an unfortunate fact but a very essential element of the very project they are doing you must de...
item.description:
The racism is not an accident or an unfortunate fact but a very essential element of the very project they are doing you must dehumanised degrade or dismiss the humanity of the people that you are committing heinous war crimes against

item.title: He experienced the cognitive dissonance a lot of us went through so long ago we don’t even remember: the tolerance of extreme mi...
item.description:
He experienced the cognitive dissonance a lot of us went through so long ago we don’t even remember: the tolerance of extreme militarism into our society.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s racist to condemn people that are happier a racist is gone
item.description:
It’s racist to condemn people that are happier a racist is gone. My thoughts and prayers are in fact with the victims of Lindsey Graham’s policies, and I truly hope they have enough food and beverage for the party they deserve.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
